Maintenance costs, to include, per year:Maintenance costs are included in the Subscription SKUS provided above

Professional Services Central
*Sophos customers can complete the “Administrator” training as self paced online training via the Sophos customer training portal. On purchasing one of these e-learning SKU’s the customer will be automatically emailed a voucher code on the licence schedule document, which they can then use to access the training materials online.
